creator: h@hartzer.sh
text:
Hi Travis,

Nice port! I saw your request for feedback. I looked it over and while I have little to offer in terms of experience with ports, I did catch one possible nit.

It appears there may be some odd space/tab formatting in the Makefile. I noticed this in the diff where certain parameters that I would expect to be level were not.

Just figured I would mention it since you requested feedback. To me, though, it looks good! Nice work! Definitely not the simplest port one could do.
